title: Mata Hari's Daughter
writer: Jacques Laurent, Renzo Merusi, Vittorio Nino Novarese
actors: Ludmilla Tchérina, Erno Crisa, Frank Latimore
plot: Elyne, Mata Hari's daughter, perform at a Javanese cabaret. One day Prince Anak appears at the cabaret and attracts by her sensual movements and falls madly in love with Elyne. She avoids to reveal who her mother is, but some jeal...
